severity_legend.1: Data loss or focus break — severity-1 rules have no bypass for destructive cases.

rules.rationale: Focus stops at the outer view; children never receive focus.
rules.bypass: Containers intentionally acting as a single focusable unit — use a real Button instead.

rules.summary: Pair focusable POD rows with parent @FocusState.
rules.rationale: Anchors focus identity against parent redraws.
rules.bypass: Rows that already hold @State / @Observable — SwiftUI tracks identity via the property wrapper.

rules.summary: Scope custom .animation() to child content, not the focusable view.
rules.rationale: Custom animation on focusable view fights the built-in hover effect.
rules.bypass: .animation(nil, ...) to explicitly disable; animations on @FocusState-driven properties.

rules.summary: Use token-based settle delay for focus-driven animations.
rules.bypass: Cheap idempotent focus reactions (color tint) that cancel cleanly.

rules.summary: ScrollView needs focusable children to be scrollable.
rules.bypass: Code branched #if !os(tvOS); single-screen content that fits without scrolling.

rules.rationale: Full-page jumps on 1920x1080 feel jarring; .viewAligned matches platform expectations.
rules.bypass: True full-screen pager UX (onboarding, slideshow) where page boundaries are intentional.

rules.summary: Verify focus animations on real Apple TV hardware.
rules.rationale: Simulator does not replicate the hover curve, perspective lift, or specular shine.
rules.bypass: Animations not interacting with focus — still smoke-test on hardware before shipping.

rules.summary: Dismiss modals via .onExitCommand, not visible Close button.
rules.rationale: Menu button is the canonical tvOS dismissal. Close buttons clutter layout and confuse focus.
rules.bypass: Cross-platform shared code — .onExitCommand also triggers on macOS Escape (tvOS 13+, macOS 10.15+); no-op on iOS / iPadOS.

rules.summary: Destructive confirmationDialog / alert declares Cancel first.
rules.rationale: tvOS focus engine places default focus on first declared button; no pointer to override.
rules.bypass: Non-destructive confirmations where either choice is safe. Never bypass for role: .destructive.

rules.summary: Never manually reassert focus via DispatchQueue.main.asyncAfter.
rules.rationale: Hijacks events VoiceOver and Switch Control expect to handle themselves.
Rectangle().fill(.clear) used to capture focus should not announce as a button.
rules.bypass: Genuinely actionable helpers — model as a real Button.

rules.rationale: .sheet() focus containment is not reliable on tvOS; assume leak unless verified on hardware.
rules.bypass: Cross-platform code may use .sheet() on iOS branches and .fullScreenCover() on tvOS.

rules.rationale: Glass button (.glass / .glassProminent) inside glass-backed modal or chrome surface produces muddy double-blur.
rules.bypass: Glass chrome surfaces (toolbar / nav bar / tab bar) where the foreground itself is not glass.

rules.summary: No .buttonStyle(.plain) with custom styling on focusable views.
rules.rationale: Loses automatic focus-ring management; rings clip against ScrollView containers.
rules.bypass: Non-focusable content rows (display only) can use .plain safely.

rules.summary: Walk tvOS QA checklist before merging.
rules.rationale: Toolbar traversal, default focus on entry, Menu-button dismiss path, no focus flicker.
rules.bypass: PRs that touch zero tvOS-rendered code.
